profile.audience: skeptical counsel, providers, regulators, and technical reviewers
profile.subtitle: What the code supports, what it does not, and what evidence could overturn the boundary
profile.title: The Ajax Line Under Adversarial Review

units.does_not_prove: Impossibility, flawless compliance, zero processing or retention, absence of negotiated differences, or harmlessness.

Documented DPA processing/agreement boundary only; content_sha256:dccc8d857d3b5fc5f7e119bca400ce27c72319bfa93d5e4c6901eb3527d16eb4; Sections B, F, H, Schedule 2; not a tenant observation

selector.exact: A fair analysis starts with the evidence that would defeat its own concern. The registered record contains no completed provider-retention or cross-customer reuse chain and includes meaningful controls: local persistence conventions, default matter separation, read-only leaves, schema restrictions, allowlists, and human gates. Those facts do not establish runtime enforcement, but they prevent the paper from presenting covert ontology capture as observed conduct. The burden remains on new evidence, not on rhetorical repetition of the risk scenario.
selector.suffix: Impossibility, flawless compliance, zero processing or retention, absence of negotiated differences, or harmlessness.

units.does_not_prove: Actual tenant configuration, data movement, retention, training, connector execution, or deployed runtime equivalence.

scripts/deploy-managed-agent.sh lines 75-190
Pinned repository static design boundary

selector.exact: The code plainly asks users to formalize firm practice, but that observation cuts both ways. It supports the ontology-capture concern at the design layer while also describing the ordinary purpose of a useful legal assistant: adapting to its customer's instructions. Local-path conventions, explicit inputs, review gates, and matter separation are substantial benign evidence. The repository therefore supports a finding of deliberate customer-specific workflow encoding, not a finding that Anthropic receives, retains, or reuses a populated firm ontology.
selector.suffix: Actual tenant configuration, data movement, retention, training, connector execution, or deployed runtime equivalence.

units.does_not_prove: Ownership, legal protectability, uniqueness, portability, technical learnability, or economic value.

locators.locator: OBHDP Vol. 82 Issue 1 pp. 150-169; DOI 10.1006/obhd.2000.2893; abstract and interaction-network knowledge-transfer framework
JIT Vol. 15 Issue 1 pp. 69-78; DOI 10.1177/026839620001500106; abstract and two-phase law-firm study

selector.exact: The strongest version of the asset claim is still conditional. A sequence of context, decision, rationale, and outcome may encode repeatable institutional judgment, but much legal work is standardized, public, or shared across firms. The relevant proposition survives only if these relationships predict valuable decisions beyond public materials and generic professional practice. Until that benchmark exists, the professional interaction graph is a useful research object rather than proven proprietary alpha, protected property, or a measured source of competitive advantage.
selector.suffix: Ownership, legal protectability, uniqueness, portability, technical learnability, or economic value.

units.does_not_prove: That a named provider currently captures, retains, pools, trains on, or generalizes a firm's ontology.

locators.locator: Captured HTML Sections A.2, B, and E; content_sha256:573e1018aec92cc04fc1c60bce27959e8efeddb9d15ce76992fbadb31885b282; retrieved 2026-07-15T13:29:28Z

Captured HTML API and data retention sections, feature eligibility table, stateful products, and ZDR exclusions; content_sha256:386dd211007587aa05ce59bb6869690c8c74976df8161d9fe57ad5d31e1de02e; retrieved 2026-07-15T13:12:19Z
Documented feature-dependent retention/ZDR policy boundary only; content_sha256:386dd211007587aa05ce59bb6869690c8c74976df8161d9fe57ad5d31e1de02e; not a tenant observation
Documented DPA processing/agreement boundary only; content_sha256:dccc8d857d3b5fc5f7e119bca400ce27c72319bfa93d5e4c6901eb3527d16eb4; Sections B, F, H, Schedule 2; not a tenant observation

selector.exact: A hostile interpretation fails unless it can move from capability to observed conduct. Remote connectors, notifications, hosted agents, feedback channels, and support paths are normal product features and may operate under restrictive agreements. To survive falsification, an exposure claim must identify data that actually crosses the boundary, the operator that receives it, applicable retention, and a permitted or observed secondary use. None of those closed-runtime steps is completed by the static repository, and the absence must remain visible rather than being filled with suspicion.
selector.suffix: That a named provider currently captures, retains, pools, trains on, or generalizes a firm's ontology.

units.does_not_prove: Present harm, provider intent, data aggregation, antitrust violation, transferability, substitutability, or inevitability.

locators.locator: OECD AI Papers No. 18 PDF; content_sha256:bd8b592d5015d0c8af67ffedfda4961917828d37bde0ef48bc50ffbece97f0d0; sections on customer-held and specialised industry data, feedback effects, concentration, and market tipping
OBHDP DOI 10.1006/obhd.2000.2893; interaction-network knowledge and transfer framework (hypothesis context only)

selector.exact: The externality thesis is the paper's most contestable empirical step. Legal strategies may be highly contextual, non-transferable, client-specific, or inseparable from privileged facts. Providers may contractually prohibit reuse, and generalized models may gain little from sparse firm traces. The claim therefore remains a hypothesis that should be rejected if a clean benchmark shows no repeatable advantage beyond public data, or if authenticated architecture and terms prevent cross-customer retention and semantic derivative reuse.
selector.suffix: Present harm, provider intent, data aggregation, antitrust violation, transferability, substitutability, or inevitability.

units.does_not_prove: Guaranteed security, competitive superiority, compliance, provider wrongdoing, or business survival.

locators.locator: Captured HTML Sections A.2, B, and E; content_sha256:573e1018aec92cc04fc1c60bce27959e8efeddb9d15ce76992fbadb31885b282; retrieved 2026-07-15T13:29:28Z

OECD AI Papers No. 18 PDF; content_sha256:bd8b592d5015d0c8af67ffedfda4961917828d37bde0ef48bc50ffbece97f0d0; sections on customer-held and specialised industry data, feedback effects, concentration, and market tipping
OBHDP DOI 10.1006/obhd.2000.2893; interaction-network knowledge and transfer framework (hypothesis context only)
Opening explanation, health-provider example, and purchasing-manager Q&A

selector.exact: The recommended controls also deserve skepticism. Sovereignty language can conceal cost, duplication, vendor lock-in of a different kind, or restrictions that prevent useful learning. The Ajax Line should survive only where specific controls measurably improve custody, purpose limitation, auditability, portability, and exit. It is not a call for collective refusal, an assertion of provider wrongdoing, or proof that a sovereign architecture will outperform a managed service. Each firm must make its own lawful and evidence-informed choice.
selector.suffix: Guaranteed security, competitive superiority, compliance, provider wrongdoing, or business survival.

units.does_not_prove: That an AlphaGo moment exists in law, that Go predicts legal performance, or that private expert traces are necessary.

locators.locator: A creative spark section, captured page lines 140-144
Nature 550, 354-359; DOI 10.1038/nature24270; abstract and observation lines 64-66 (2026-07-14)
NeurIPS 2024 algorithmic-efficiency study; abstract, methodology, and fixed-threshold results across >200 LM evaluations (2012-2023)

selector.exact: Go is not law. It has fixed rules, a defined objective, complete observability, and abundant self-play, while legal work has changing rules, multiple stakeholders, privileged facts, normative constraints, and ambiguous outcomes. Invoking Move 37 can make ordinary surprise look profound after the fact. The analogy should remain outside the causal chain unless a robust legal benchmark demonstrates delayed strategic advantage without sacrificing correctness, duties, or legitimacy.
selector.suffix: That an AlphaGo moment exists in law, that Go predicts legal performance, or that private expert traces are necessary.
